testCases: TC1: input { param1: 100, param2: 2, param3: "ToolA", param4: false } → calculate → { total: 10, breakdown: { baseRate: 0.10, resolutionFactor: 1.0, priorityMultiplier: 1.0, subtotal: 10 } }
TC2: input { param1: 100, param2: 2, param3: "ToolA", param4: true } → calculate → { total: 12, breakdown: { baseRate: 0.10, resolutionFactor: 1.0, priorityMultiplier: 1.2, subtotal: 12 } }
TC3: input { param1: 50, param2: 3, param3: "ToolC", param4: false } → calculate → { total: 8.4, breakdown: { baseRate: 0.12, resolutionFactor: 1.4, priorityMultiplier: 1.0, subtotal: 8.4 } }
TC4: input { param1: 100, param2: 2, param3: "ToolD", param4: false } → calculate → { error: "Invalid tool option." }
TC5: input { param1: -10, param2: 2, param3: "ToolA", param4: false } → calculate → { error: "Duration must be greater than 0." }
TC6: input { param1: 0, param2: 2, param3: "ToolA", param4: false } → calculate → { error: "Duration must be greater than 0." }
TC7: input { param1: 100, param2: 0, param3: "ToolA", param4: false } → calculate → { error: "Resolution index must be 1, 2, or 3." }
TC8: input { param1: 100, param2: 4, param3: "ToolA", param4: false } → calculate → { error: "Resolution index must be 1, 2, or 3." }
TC9: input { param1: 100, param2: 2, param3: "ToolA", param4: "yes" } → calculate → { error: "Priority must be a boolean." }
TC10: input { param1: 100, param2: 2, param4: false } → calculate → { error: "Tool option is required." }

TC11: input { param1: 1000000, param2: 2, param3: "ToolB", param4: false } → calculate → { total: 80000, breakdown: { baseRate: 0.08, resolutionFactor: 1.0, priorityMultiplier: 1.0, subtotal: 80000 } }
TC12: input { param1: 33, param2: 1, param3: "ToolA", param4: false } → calculate → { total: 2.97, breakdown: { baseRate: 0.10, resolutionFactor: 0.9, priorityMultiplier: 1.0, subtotal: 2.97 } }
TC13: input { param1: 0.5, param2: 2, param3: "ToolC", param4: false } → calculate → { total: 0.06, breakdown: { baseRate: 0.12, resolutionFactor: 1.0, priorityMultiplier: 1.0, subtotal: 0.06 } }
TC14: input { param1: 0, param2: 2, param3: "ToolA", param4: true } → calculate → { error: "Duration must be greater than 0." }
TC15: input { param1: NaN, param2: 2, param3: "ToolA", param4: false } → calculate → { error: "Duration must be a number." }
TC16: input { param1: 100, param2: "2", param3: "ToolA", param4: false } → calculate → { error: "Resolution index must be a number." }
TC17: input { param1: 100, param2: 2.5, param3: "ToolA", param4: false } → calculate → { error: "Resolution index must be 1, 2, or 3." }
TC18: input { param1: 500, param2: 3, param3: "ToolB", param4: true } → calculate → { total: 67.2, breakdown: { baseRate: 0.08, resolutionFactor: 1.4, priorityMultiplier: 1.2, subtotal: 67.2 } }
TC19: input { param1: 100, param2: 2, param3: "", param4: false } → calculate → { error: "Tool option is required." }
TC20: validate({ param1: -10, param2: 2, param3: "ToolD", param4: false }) → { valid: false, errors: ["Duration must be greater than 0.", "Invalid tool option."] }
TC21: validate({ param1: 100, param2: 2, param3: "ToolA", param4: false }) → { valid: true, errors: [] }
TC22: validate({ param1: 100, param2: 2, param3: "ToolA", param4: null }) → { valid: false, errors: ["Priority must be a boolean."] }
